events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need output JSON only. Scenario: commercial construction, Sitework & Utilities, Locates & marking. Observed field condition: digging without 811 locate. Stage rough-complete. Component condition categories may apply: installed-defective. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision must fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Digging without 811 locate is non-compliant, dangerous (can strike utilities). Risk high/critical. Work stage rough-complete? Actually observed digging in progress maybe in-progress but given stage rough-complete. Use rough-complete. percent_complete estimate maybe 60? value 0. component_conditions installed-defective and non-compliant. Findings: excavation/trenching commenced without valid 811 one-call utility locate, no white-lined proposed excavation area, no locate ticket posted or on-site, no verification/spotting of utilities. Actions: stop digging, contact 811 and obtain locate ticket, maintain clearance/spot utilities, document. References: 811/CGA best practices, OSHA 1926.651(b) maybe. Need fill order, workable, sound_source defaults empty list, empty string. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, confidence high 0.95.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":60,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.95,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Excavation digging proceeded without a valid 811 one-call utility locate ticket","No evidence of white-lining or pre-marking of the proposed excavation area","No locate marks or documentation posted/available on site prior to digging","Failure to verify/spot underground utilities before mechanical excavation"],"actions":["Immediately stop all excavation and secure the trench/banked spoil","Call 811 and obtain a valid locate ticket before any further digging","Pre-mark the excavation area and wait for required utility locates to be completed","Spot-expose utilities by hand digging within tolerance zone before resuming mechanized excavation","Notify superintendent/inspector and document corrective actions"],"rationale":"Digging without first obtaining an 811 locate is a serious safety and code violation that creates imminent risk of utility strikes, injuries, and service outages. 811/CGA best practices require a locate request and on-site marking before breaking ground.","references":["811/CGA best practices - call before you dig","OSHA 29 CFR 1926.651(b) - utilities underground installations"]}
